name: To To To To To To To To Sahur
lore:
Lore of To To To To To To To To Sahur
                                    


To To To Sahur is one of the characters derived from Tung Tung Tung Sahur family. He is also a part of the sahur family because he is also a sahur character. He welds a metal tung bat that may just be a metal pole.
The username in Roblox of the Creator of To To To Sahur Is @Ripvanwinkle2366. To To To Sahur is one of the few brainrots that has been added to Steal A Brainrot. The lyrics call him Toh Toh Toh Sahur
To To To Sahur Is An Italian Brainrot. He Most Likely Is An Iron Pipe holding a rod. toh is also a way to say "Ah" in indonesian. He is from the sahur family like Tung tung tung sahur, tatatata sahur, ti ti ti ti sahur, Te Te Te Sahur, Paman Paman Sahur, and Los Tungtungtungcitos
Lyrics
Original (Indonesian)
Original (Indonesian)
Toh, toh, toh, toh, toh, toh, toh, sahur anomali. Eksatin lili makasutgen maye leitos un paleg en kafegi forikuan, paseag peg diambulag kwid ag trumbulum ler sikin on sopon perke lili makasutgen.
Translated (English)
Toh, toh, toh, toh, toh, toh, toh, sahur this is an anomaly during sahur. The excitement is great, making this moment enjoyable while waiting for the food to arrive, especially with the delicious dishes on the table that bring joy.
Translated (Italian)
Toh, toh, toh, toh, toh, toh, toh, sahur! Questa è un'anomalia durante il sahur. L'eccitazione è fantastica, rendendo questo momento piacevole mentre si aspetta che arriva il cibo, specialmente con i piatti deliziosi sul tavolo, che portano gioia.
